steps.title: Keep the noun phrase intact
steps.content: The blank introduces the organism's common category before its scientific name: the fungus Hydnum albidum. No punctuation should interrupt that noun phrase.

steps.title: Remove disruptive punctuation
steps.content: A creates a sentence break before the scientific name. C introduces the name with an unnecessary colon. D incorrectly separates fungus from the identifying scientific name. The unpunctuated noun phrase is the standard construction. The answer is B.
